title: MTR3 Next Technology Addon
description: The MTR3 Next Technology Addon is a mod that provides technical enhancements for Minecraft Transit Railway version 3.
body:
## What is this MOD?
This is a MOD for MTR3 that enhances features such as ANTE scripts and communication between the server and clients.
**The versions of MODs that depend on this MOD must match exactly.**
## Important Notice
This MOD uses Mixin. Please be aware that this may cause instability.
## Overview of Some Features
- Control vehicle speed via script
- Control vehicle speed limits via script
- Retrieve MP4 video frame and audio data arrays (implemented using the JCodec library)
